title: Le avventure di Pinocchio: Storia di un burattino
author: Carlo Collodi

witnesses.label: PG #16865 (attr. M. A. Murray)
witnesses.translator: uncredited in PG metadata; commonly attributed to Mary Alice Murray (1892)
witnesses.provenance: Project Gutenberg #16865, 'Pinocchio: The Tale of a Puppet' (public domain in the USA)

alignment.notes: VERIFIED 2026-07-12 end-to-end: both editions extract 36 real chapters, 1:1, mean witness/source char ratio 0.93, no off-ratio chapters. Two GENERIC adapter fixes were needed (both now in scripts/lib/adapters/epub-adapter.ts and helping any Gutenberg book): within-file chapter splitting (PG packs many chapters per xhtml; guarded so the table of contents is not shredded) and Gutenberg-boilerplate stripping (PG appends the licence to the SAME file as the final chapter, so dropping files that mention 'Project Gutenberg' silently deleted chapter XXXVI).

distribution: PUBLIC — both texts public domain; unlike Calvino, this book's data (session, grounded JSON, payload) MAY be committed, so the full completeness/alignment gate can run in CI.
gateStatus: Stages ran with ZERO code changes. I1-I4, I6-I8 pass. I5 (now embedding-based) = 16 drift pairs + 2 disclosed reorderings -> gate FAILS honestly. Root cause shared with Calvino u6: DIALOGUE paragraph structure diverges between editions, so paragraph beads misalign and everything inside drifts.
